mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_image_audit_record (applicant_user_id, image_id, apply_reason, status, create_time) VALUES (#{applicantUserId}, #{imageId}, #{applyReason}, 0, NOW())
mapper.update:
UPDATE biz_image_audit_record
status = #{status},
reviewer_user_id = #{reviewerUserId},
reject_reason = #{rejectReason},
review_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.applicant_user_id, a.image_id, a.apply_reason, a.status, a.reviewer_user_id, (SELECT username FROM sys_user WHERE id = a.reviewer_user_id) AS reviewer_username, a.reject_reason, a.create_time, a.review_time, i.filename, i.oss_url FROM biz_image_audit_record a LEFT JOIN biz_image i ON i.id = a.image_id WHERE a.status = 0 ORDER BY a.create_time ASC
